Wiki / Credits

Credits & about

Strider657's Milkshake Mania is an indie incremental clicker built with React + Vite. Here's the team behind it.

The team

Credits

Strider657 Lead developer, solo composer & first playtester
Oliver382 Lead concept designer & second playtester
Reuben G. Playtester — balancing & GUI feedback
Max L. Playtester — gameplay feedback
About

The game

What it is

An idle / incremental clicker: blend milkshakes, unlock flavors, hire staff, buy upgrades, expand worldwide, and grow a tiny shop into a milkshake empire.

Where to play

Free in any modern browser on desktop or mobile. An optional Windows launcher adds offline play, version management, and auto-updates.

License

© 2026 Strider657. All rights reserved. Free to play with no ads and no purchases; redistribution, reverse engineering, and reuse of assets are not permitted. The in-game About panel has the full EULA.

Found a bug or have an idea? Open an issue on the project's GitHub releases/repo — reproduction steps and screenshots help a lot.
